About

The Developer Behind
the Scripts

I am Elephantpoopp, a Roblox Scripter with 3+ years of experience building gameplay systems, mechanics, and polished experiences in Roblox Studio.

I specialize in clean, efficient Lua code that powers games from the ground up, from core game loops to complex systems that keep players engaged.

Portfolio

Featured Work

Systems and projects built over 3+ years in Roblox Studio.

Most systems and projects are undocumented and built for private use.

UI
Game Menu UI
UI
Game Menu UI
Full game menu UI with working Store, Gifts, Config, Stats, Rebirth, Codes and Day tabs. Includes a rebirth system showing cash, gem and block rewards, animated progress bar and interactive buttons — all built for fun.

Full admin panel with announcements, polls, events, VFX effects and server boosts. Built entirely from scratch in Lua.

Admin
Admin Abuse System
Full admin panel built from scratch. Features include server announcements, poll system with live vote bars, events with VFX effects like Lava, Disco, Thunder and more, server boosts like 2X Luck and 2X Cash, gift system and a custom notification UI. All scripted in Lua.
